name: Old Fashioned Banana Cream Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine flour, sugar, salt, and eggs in a medium saucepan.
2. Beat with a hand mixer or wire whisk until well mixed.
3. Gradually add milk and continue beating until smooth.
4. Cook over medium heat until the mixture thickens, stirring constantly.
5. Remove from heat and stir in butter and 1 teaspoon vanilla.
6. Place in the refrigerator to cool.
7. Slice bananas and place them into the cooked pie shell.
8. Remove custard from the refrigerator and spoon over the bananas.
9. Whip whipping cream until soft peaks form.
10. Gradually add sugar and whip until stiff.
11. Fold in the remaining vanilla.
12. Spread over the pie, sealing edges.
13. Refrigerate and serve very cold.
